metadata.seed: Why live without her? Sure, I can live without her. But I just don't want to. She is the only one I'll ever truly love. What's the point if I'll never love another the same way? Oneitis? Maybe. But I've met girls after her. None interest me enough to even bother. She is just so special to me...

patient.query: Why live without her? Sure, I can live without her. But I just don't want to. She is the only one I'll ever truly love. What's the point if I'll never love another the same way? Oneitis? Maybe. But I've met girls after her. None interest me enough to even bother. She is just so special to me...

automatic_thoughts: I'll never love another the same way
she is so special to me

neutral: Ability to resist obsessional thoughts (observable entity)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're caught between acknowledging you *can* move forward and the deep longing you feel for her. What makes her feel so uniquely special to you?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like you're experiencing a lot of pain and longing, and it's incredibly difficult to imagine a future without her. It's understandable that you feel this way, especially when you feel so deeply connected to someone.

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: I'll never love another the same way
retrieved_concepts_used.label: automatic_thoughts

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds like you're caught between acknowledging you *can* move forward and the deep longing you feel for her. What makes her feel so uniquely special to you?

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds like you're really struggling with the thought that life won't be the same without her, and it's incredibly painful to feel that way. What do you think a close friend might say about your belief that you'll never love anyone the same way?

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: automatic_thoughts: I can't live without her
retrieved_concepts_used.label: automatic_thoughts

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: automatic_thoughts: I'll never love another the same way
retrieved_concepts_used.label: automatic_thoughts

safety_check.response: It sounds incredibly painful to feel so attached and to be struggling with the thought of moving forward. When you said you don't *want* to live without her, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
